testcase.name: testTenantIsolationOnCustomerAccess

table if exists vehicles cascade Hibernate: create table accounts (balance numeric(38,2) not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, code varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, type enum ('ASSET','EQUITY','EXPENSE','LIABILITY','REVENUE') not null, primary key (id), constraint uc_account_code_tenant unique (code, tenant_id)) Hibernate: create table audit_logs (timestamp timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, action varchar(255) not null, entity_id varchar(255), entity_name varchar(255), payload TEXT, username varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table billing_records (amount float(53), created_at timestamp(6), paid_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, currency varchar(255), payment_method varchar(255), payment_status varchar(255), transaction_ref varchar(255), plan_type enum ('ENTERPRISE','FREE','PRO','STARTER'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table categories (is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table customers (is_deleted boolean, total_spent float(53), visit_count integer, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, branch_id uuid, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, address varchar(255), email varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, nic varchar(255), phone varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table employees (is_deleted boolean, activation_token_expiry timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, activation_token varchar(255), department varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ACCOUNTANT','ADMIN','CASHIER','HR_OFFICER','MANAGER','OWNER','STORE_KEEPER','SUPER_ADMIN') not null, status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING_APPROVAL','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table expenses (amount numeric(38,2) not null, date date not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, category varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255) not null, reference varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table file_objects (file_size bigint, uploaded_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, reference_id uuid, tenant_id uuid, file_name varchar(255), file_type varchar(255), file_url varchar(255), module varchar(255), storage_key varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table goods_received_notes (is_deleted boolean, quantity_received float(53) not null, received_date date, stock_updated boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, product_id uuid not null, purchase_order_id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, grn_number varchar(255) not null unique, notes varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table incomes (amount numeric(38,2) not null, date date not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, category varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255) not null, reference varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inspection_items (is_checked boolean, id uuid not null, inspection_id uuid not null, item_name varchar(255) not null, remarks TEXT, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inspections (estimated_cost float(53), is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), branch_id uuid, id uuid not null, job_card_id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, overall_notes TEXT, status enum ('APPROVED','COMPLETED','IN_PROGRESS','PENDING','REJECTED'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table invoice_items (is_deleted boolean, quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, invoice_id uuid, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, product_name varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table invoices (balance numeric(38,2), discount numeric(38,2), is_deleted boolean, paid_amount numeric(38,2) not null, sub_total numeric(38,2), tax numeric(38,2), total numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, customer_id uuid, id uuid not null, job_card_id uuid unique, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, invoice_number varchar(255), status enum ('CANCELLED','CONFIRMED','DRAFT','PAID','PARTIALLY_PAID'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table job_cards (invoice_generated boolean not null, is_deleted boolean, labor_cost float(53), parts_cost float(53), total_cost float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, branch_id uuid, created_by uuid, customer_id uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, job_number varchar(255) not null unique, vehicle_number varchar(255), status enum ('ASSIGNED','CANCELLED','COMPLETED','CREATED','INVOICED','IN_PROGRESS','ON_HOLD'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table journal_entries (entry_date date not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, description varchar(255) not null, reference_number varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payments (amount numeric(38,2), is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, invoice_id uuid, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, method enum ('CARD','CASH','MOBILE_PAYMENT','ONLINE_TRANSFER'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table products (cost_price float(53), is_deleted boolean, quantity integer, reorder_level integer, selling_price float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, category_id uuid, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, barcode varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, sku varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table purchase_order_items (quantity float(53) not null, total_cost numeric(38,2), unit_cost numeric(38,2), id uuid not null, product_id uuid not null, purchase_order_id uuid not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table purchase_orders (is_deleted boolean, total_amount numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, supplier_id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, notes varchar(255), po_number varchar(255) not null unique, status enum ('CANCELLED','DRAFT','RECEIVED','SUBMITTED'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens (expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, user_id uuid not null, token varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table stock (quantity float(53), id uuid not null, product_id uuid, tenant_id uuid not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table stock_movements (quantity float(53), created_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, product_id uuid, tenant_id uuid not null, reference varchar(255), type enum ('ADJUSTMENT','IN','OUT'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table suppliers (is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, address varchar(255), contact_name varchar(255), email varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), tax_number varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table tenant_modules (tenant_id uuid not null, module_key enum ('ACCOUNTING','CRM','HRM','INVENTORY','POS')) Hibernate: create table tenant_subscriptions (active boolean not null, end_date date, start_date date, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid unique, plan_type enum ('ENTERPRISE','FREE','PRO','STARTER'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table tenants (id uuid not null, industry varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table transaction_lines (amount numeric(38,2) not null, is_debit boolean not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, account_id uuid not null, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, journal_entry_id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (active boolean not null, is_deleted boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, created_by uuid, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, email varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ACCOUNTANT','ADMIN','CASHIER','HR_OFFICER','MANAGER','OWNER','STORE_KEEPER','SUPER_ADMIN') not null, primary key (id), constraint uc_user_username_tenant unique (username, tenant_id)) Hibernate: create table vehicles (is_deleted boolean, last_service_date date, mileage integer, next_service_due date, year_of_manufacture integer, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, branch_id uuid, created_by uuid, customer_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, updated_by uuid, brand varchar(255), chassis_number varchar(255), color varchar(255), engine_number varchar(255), fuel_type varchar(255), model varchar(255), vehicle_number varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create index idx_account_tenant on accounts (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_account_code on accounts (code) Hibernate: create index idx_audit_log_tenant on audit_logs (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_audit_log_action on audit_logs (action) Hibernate: create index idx_category_tenant on categories (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_customer_tenant on customers (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_customer_phone on customers (phone) Hibernate: create index idx_expense_tenant on expenses (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_expense_date on expenses (date) Hibernate: create index idx_grn_tenant on goods_received_notes (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_income_tenant on incomes (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_income_date on incomes (date) Hibernate: create index idx_inspection_item_inspection on inspection_items (inspection_id) Hibernate: create index idx_inspection_tenant on inspections (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_inspection_jobcard on inspections (job_card_id) Hibernate: create index idx_journal_tenant on journal_entries (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_journal_date on journal_entries (entry_date) Hibernate: create index idx_product_tenant on products (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_po_tenant on purchase_orders (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_refresh_token_val on refresh_tokens (token) Hibernate: create index idx_refresh_token_tenant on refresh_tokens (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_stock_product on stock (product_id) Hibernate: create index idx_stock_tenant on stock (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_supplier_tenant on suppliers (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_tx_line_tenant on transaction_lines (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_user_tenant on users (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_vehicle_tenant on vehicles (tenant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_vehicle_number on vehicles (vehicle_number) Hibernate: alter table if exists accounts add
